description_long: This clock tower features a tall, rectangular stone structure with a textured gray brick facade. The front side displays a large, round clock face with black Roman numerals and black hands, set within a gold-trimmed border. At the base of the tower, there is a wooden double-door entrance with a small overhang. The roof is a steep, reddish-brown spire with a smooth, curved peak, giving the tower a distinctive silhouette. The sides and rear of the tower are plain, with only the clock face visible on the front and one adjacent side. The overall appearance suggests a blend of traditional and slightly modernized architectural elements, suitable for a public square or urban park.
description: A tall, gray brick clock tower with a prominent round clock face, wooden entrance doors, and a reddish-brown spire roof.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main clock face, wooden double-door entrance, and the full height of the spire roof.
description_view_1: Angled side view revealing the clock face wrapping around the corner and the side profile of the spire roof.
description_view_2: Rear view with a plain brick surface and no visible clock face or entrance.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view, showing the side brick wall and partial view of the clock face on the adjacent side.
attribute_clock_face_design: The clock face is large, round, and bordered with a gold ring. It features black Roman numerals marking each hour, black minute and hour hands, and a white background. The design is classic and functional, with no additional decorative elements beyond the gold trim.
